overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic industrial district in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks along wide concrete roads past red shipping barriers and industrial complexes, navigates an intersection with automated traffic, and turns onto a street lined with palm trees and industrial retaining walls. Bright sunlight illuminates smokestacks and yellow gantry cranes against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront road with red shipping barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide industrial road, approaching the intersection ahead with gantry cranes visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall metal pole with traffic signals and walk signs attached
long row of red metal shipping barriers with white cylindrical tanks
large yellow industrial gantry crane structure spanning across the area
tall industrial chimney emitting white smoke into the sky
massive cylindrical industrial building with multiple levels and antennae

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial road under bright sunlight. The camera walks forward past a traffic light pole on the right, with red shipping barriers running parallel on the right side. In the distance, yellow gantry cranes, smoking chimneys, and massive cylindrical industrial towers dominate the skyline. The area is devoid of pedestrians and traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with active vehicle traffic

events.description: colorful sports car with red and green paint enters the intersection from the left
silver pickup truck drives through the intersection from right to left
camera moves around the end of the red barriers to navigate the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through the industrial intersection, moving around the barriers while watching automated traffic pass by

notable_agents.action: colorful sports car driving through the intersection from left to right
silver pickup truck moving through the intersection

entered.detail: low-slung sports car with red and green iridescent paint job
futuristic silver pickup truck with extended cab
large multi-story industrial facility with pipes and exhaust vents

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters a busy industrial intersection. Automated vehicles including a colorful sports car and silver pickup truck drive through the crossing. The camera navigates around the end of the red shipping barriers while the yellow gantry cranes remain visible in the background. The industrial building complex on the left becomes more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with concrete retaining walls and palm trees

events.description: turns left onto a new street lined with high concrete walls and palm trees
orange station wagon drives past the camera on the left

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and proceeding down the street alongside the industrial wall, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: orange station wagon driving down the street past the camera
blue pickup truck approaching from behind on the right

entered.detail: tall gray concrete retaining wall with vertical panel texture
tall palm trees lining the street in a row
large advertisement billboard mounted on the concrete wall
overhead metal gantry with directional traffic signs
vintage-style orange station wagon with black trim

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left onto a different industrial street characterized by a high concrete wall on the left with billboards, and palm trees lining the road. An orange station wagon and blue pickup truck pass by on the asphalt road. Overhead traffic signs indicate directions, while industrial smokestacks remain visible in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a bright industrial district that transitions from a desolate road into a bustling urban intersection and finally onto a palm-lined street. It begins by moving forward along a wide concrete road past red shipping barriers, with yellow gantry cranes and smoking chimneys dominating the distant skyline. As the camera approaches a busy intersection, the silence gives way to automated traffic, including a colorful sports car and a silver pickup truck, while a massive industrial complex becomes more prominent on the left. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left, moving away from the barriers and toward a high concrete wall adorned with billboards. Finally, the view opens up to a street lined with palm trees and overhead traffic signs, with an orange station wagon and blue pickup truck passing by under the distant gaze of industrial smokestacks.
